stimulus: Archaeologists have estimated that the ancient port city of Caral, located in the Supe Valley about 200 kilometers north of modern-day Lima, Peru, supported as many as 3,000 inhabitants around 2600 ______blank it among the oldest urban centers in the Americas.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The participial phrase "making it among the oldest urban centers in the Americas" is a nonessential supplement describing the preceding clause. It must be set off with a comma.

Choice A is incorrect because omitting punctuation creates a run-on sentence. Choice C is incorrect because the participial phrase has no subject and cannot stand alone as a sentence. Choice D is incorrect because a semicolon can join only two independent clauses, and "making...Americas" is not independent.
